childhood.education: Bachelor of Business from Seoul National University; M.B.A. from Seoul National University
childhood.earlyLife: Hyuntae Kim built a career in financial services and asset management before entering the biotech industry. He held positions as head of asset management at several major Korean investment firms including LS Securities, Hanwha Investment & Securities, and KB Securities, where he developed expertise in investment strategy and portfolio management.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 김현태는 바이오테크 산업에 진출하기 전에 금융 서비스 및 자산 관리 분야에서 경력을 쌓았다. LS 증권, 한화투자증권, KB 증권 등 여러 주요 한국 투자 회사에서 자산 관리 담당자로 근무했다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined eBest Investment & Securities (LS Securities) as head of asset management
Transitioned to Hanwha Investment & Securities in asset management role
Moved to KB Securities as head of asset management
Voronoi biotech company founded by brother Hyunseok
Invested 100,000 newly issued shares of Voronoi for 10,000 won each; became CEO and largest shareholder with 35% stake
careerTimeline.eventKo: 보로노이 신규 발행주식 100,000주를 주당 1만원에 인수; CEO 및 최대주주(35%) 취임

careerTimeline.event: Voronoi listed on Korea's Kosdaq stock exchange, raised 52 billion won
Share rally of 190% driven by cancer drug pipeline (VRN10, VRN11) optimism
careerTimeline.eventKo: 암 치료 약물 파이프라인(VRN10, VRN11) 개발 긍정 전망으로 주가 190% 상승

personalTraits.knownFor: Transitioning from investment finance to biotech leadership; building wealth through strategic investment in family-founded company; leading AI-powered cancer drug development
personalTraits.knownForKo: 투자 금융에서 바이오테크 경영으로의 전환; 가족 창립 회사의 전략적 투자를 통한 부의 축적; AI 기반 암 치료 약물 개발 주도
